name: Year Membership
description: Valid for 12 months. €3 discount per Sun Set event + early access to registrations.

name: 6-Months Membership
description: Valid for 6 months. €3 discount per Sun Set Padel event + early access to registrations.

name: Summer Saturday Pass - 5 Games
description: 5-game pass, redeemable only for all games during the summer season.

name: Winter Saturday Pass — 10 Games
description: 10-game pass, redeemable for all games during the summer season.
